category_sources: Official rustledger homepage presents it as modern plain text accounting.
source_facts.description identifies rustledger as a Rust implementation of Beancount double-entry accounting.
display_name_sources: Official rustledger homepage uses rustledger as the project name.
docs_sources: Official repository README is an additional official documentation surface.
Official rustledger GitHub Pages site is the primary documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/rustledger/rustledger, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
